commands.review_summary:
The PR sanitizes persisted Control UI routed direct/group session keys during settings restore so they fall back to `main`, and adds storage tests for routed direct/group key variants.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not execute it: seed scoped Control UI settings with a routed direct/group `sessionKey`, call `loadSettings()`, and current main flows that value into `OpenClawApp.sessionKey` before defaults preserve it.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer real-behavior proof plus a restore-policy/mergeability decision; no narrow automated code repair is currently identified.
